items.title: Fun game
items.summary:
Aug 6th, 2025
Currently at chapter 5. 
Pros:
The rouge like exploration of the story stages is a lot of fun. Deck building aspect has been a blast. The voice overs for the characters are really nice.
Cons:
Since the developers are honest enough to tell consumers they may nerf characters after release, I can’t find myself getting excited for a new character release.
Character skins, at least viewing them in the store, are not that impressive or enough of a change.
Events are really AP/stamina hungry to run a single time and character levels/ascensions are tied to player level, story progression, or a tower challenge that requires a lot of time to progress. With events being so stamina hungry it makes it difficult to farm for exp or character materials.
items.author: RaptorPm
